TextView.android:text:
Meditation

1.Find a Quiet Place
Sit in a calm and quiet place where you will not be disturbed.

2.Focus on Breathing
Focus on your breathing slowly in and out to help relax the mind.

3.Start Small
Start with 5 to 10 minutes daily and increase time gradually.

4.Close Your Eyes
Closing your eyes helps you concentrate better and avoid distractions.

5.Sit Comfortably
Sit in a comfortable position without straining your body.

6.Clear Your Mind
Try to let go of stressful thoughts and stay calm and relaxed.

7.Be Consistent
Practice meditation daily to get better results over time.

8.Relax Your Body
Let your body relax completely and feel the calmness during meditation.
